name: Watergate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box (3 ½ oz) instant pistacho pudding
1 box (3 ½ oz) instant pistacho pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pistacho pudding with cake mix.
2. Add all other cake ingredients except nuts and beat for about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped nuts.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9" x 13" pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
6. To make topping, beat instant pistacho pudding with milk until stiff.
7. Fold in Cool Whip.
8. Spread topping over the cooled cake.
9. Place maraschino cherries and nuts on top of the cake.
